title: pelargonium × annesleyanum
intro: Pelargonium × annesleyanum, also known as Mountain Rose, is a hybrid plant species within the Geraniaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits associated with Pelargonium × annesleyanum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used to treat colds, flu, and other minor ailments.
